nodes.label_negative: AI as final authority without verification

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: cut at least an hour off of my research time

nodes.label: Intellectual honesty and originality
nodes.grounding_span: put it in my own words

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for research efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: extremely satisfying because it cut down my research time significantly

nodes.label: Discomfort with AI for drafting due to ethical concerns
nodes.grounding_span: still not comfortable using those services

nodes.label: Cautious openness to trying AI drafting if time-saving
nodes.grounding_span: probably will eventually relent and take a shot at using it for drafting

nodes.label: Sequential verification — uses AI summaries then reads full sources
nodes.grounding_span: I will read first to further eliminate irrelevant cases. But at the end of the day I still need to read the entire case

nodes.label: Pragmatic cost-benefit evaluation of AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: if it ends up taking more time because I end up rewriting the entire draft to put it in my own words than that will not be time saved it will be time wasted
